title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 29, 2023
summary: June 29 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 7.38% , from the level on 06/22/2023 of 10.544 M km 2 to 9.766 M km 2 for this week. title: Corn planted acreage up 6% from 2022
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) estimated 94.1 million acres of corn planted in the United States for 2023, up 6% from last year, according to the Acreage report released today.
